repo.description: Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability
repo.name: neovim

body:
## Problem

We'd like to export a PDF version of the user manual (https://github.com/neovim/neovim/issues/39950), but `gen_help_html.lua` assumes an HTML output in several places.

## Solution

Make gen() take an output param
Rename gen_one() -> gen_one_html()
Rename visit_node() -> ts_node_to_html()
Add a mapping to gen() that calls the correct gen_one*() function.

This prepares the addition of new methods for Typst output.

comment_data.body:
This code block is mostly just extracted from `gen()`. One change is that we used to print `redirect_from .. '.txt'` here, which duplicated the .txt:
```
[...]
generated (0  errors): credits.txt     => credits.html
generated (redirect) : backers.txt.txt => credits.html
generated (0  errors): deprecated.txt  => deprecated.html
generated (0  errors): dev.txt         => dev.html
generated (redirect) : develop.txt.txt => dev.html
[...]
```
etc

So I changed to just `redirect_from`.
comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -1092,6 +1092,53 @@ function M._test()
   print('all tests passed.\n')
 end
 
+--- Generate redirect pages for renamed help files.
+
+--- @param commit string?
+--- @param helpfile string Name of the help file being generated
+--- @param to_dir string Target directory where the output files will be written.
+--- @param to_fname string Name of the already-generated page in the new location
+---
+--- @return boolean Whether a redirect page has been generated
+local function generate_redirect_pages(commit, helpfile, to_dir, to_fname)
+  local helpfile_tag = (helpfile:gsub('%.txt$', '')):gsub('_', '-') -- "dev_tools.txt" => "dev-tools"
+  local redirect_from = redirects[helpfile]
+  if not redirect_from then
+    return false
+  end
+
+  local redirect_text = vim.text
+    .indent(
+      0,
+      [[
+      *%s*      Nvim
+
+      Document moved to: |%s|
+
+      ==============================================================================
+      Document moved
+
+      Document moved to: |%s|
+
+      ==============================================================================
+        vim:tw=78:ts=8:ft=help:norl:
+      ]]
+    )
+    :format(redirect_from, helpfile_tag, helpfile_tag, helpfile_tag, helpfile_tag, helpfile_tag)
+  local redirect_to_fname = get_helppage_html(redirect_from, true)
+  local redirect_to = ('%s/%s'):format(to_dir, redirect_to_fname)
+  local redirect_html, _ =
+    gen_one_html(redirect_from, redirect_text, redirect_to, false, commit or '?')
+  assert(
+    redirect_html:find(vim.pesc(helpfile_tag)),
+    ('not found in redirect html: %s'):format(helpfile_tag)
+  )
+  tofile(redirect_to, redirect_html)
+
+  print(('generated (redirect) : %-15s => %s'):format(redirect_from, vim.fs.basename(to_fname)))

comment_data.body:
```suggestion
local function gen_redirect_pages(commit, helpfile, to_dir, to_fname)
```

comment_data.body:
validate?

```suggestion
  local gen_one = generators[output_format]
  vim.validate('output_format', gen_one, 'string', output_format)
```

   print(('output dir: %s\n\n'):format(to_dir))
   vim.fn.mkdir(to_dir, 'p')
-  -- NOTE: Better for Hugo to be in static/, but works fine with contents/ as to_dir

+    gen_helptag_html(('%s/helptag.html'):format(to_dir))
+  end
+
+  -- Map output formats to the function that outputs one file in that format
+  -- NOTE: Only .html for now, but .typ is coming
+  local generators = {
+    html = gen_one_html,
+  }
+  local gen_one_file = generators[output_format]

comment_regular_data.body:
Same idea as #37742 but this time with an incremental plan described at https://github.com/neovim/neovim/issues/39950#issuecomment-4514025663.

There is a rough version of `node_to_typ()` at https://github.com/SqAtx/neovim/blob/gen_help_typ/src/gen/gen_help_html.lua, that can generate a passable `usr_01.typ`.

https://github.com/neovim/neovim.github.io/pull/479 will need to be merged immediately after this.

I have tested end-to-end with Hugo alongside the website PR:
```
$ ./gendoc.lua ../neovim
$ hugo server
```
Same Hugo 0.158.0.
Verified that the website runs fine locally, the docs pages render correctly, including the redirect ones.

One thing I wanted to do but didn't is rename the file to `export_help_docs.lua` and generally gen* to export* (the script doesn't generate the help - it converts its format). Let me know if anyone has strong opinions about that - I'd like to do it in the next commit.

labels.description: changes that are not features or bugfixes
labels.name: refactor

title: refactor(docs): separate HTML-specific bits from gen_help_html
